exemplar.title: Exploring the Impact of Temperature on Bacterial Population Growth Using Mathematical Models

detailedExemplarData.title: Exploring the Impact of Temperature on Bacterial Population Growth Using Mathematical Models

subject.title: Mathematics Applications & Interpretation (AI)
subject.description:
**IB Mathematics: Applications and Interpretation** is a **Group 5** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **real-world applications of mathematics, statistical analysis, mathematical modeling, and data interpretation**, with a strong focus on **technology use, practical problem-solving, and interpreting mathematical results in context**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | External examination (calculator permitted) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 2** | External examination (technology required) | 1h 30min | 2h | SL: 40%, HL: 30% |
| **Paper 3** | External examination (technology required) | N/A | 1h | HL: 20% |
| **Mathematical Exploration** | Internal assessment | 30h | 30h | 20% |

strengths: Exceptionally clear organization with seamless flow between sections
Effective use of headings, sub-headings, tables and figures to guide the reader
Coherent narrative from introduction through evaluation that reinforces the research question
weaknesses: Some abrupt jumps into technical derivations without explicit signposting
Repetition of definitions (e.g. logistic form) adds unnecessary length
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: While coherence and conciseness are at band 3, the exceptionally well-structured layout and smooth navigation afforded by clear headings, numberings and cross-references elevate the overall presentation to band 4.  The organization is so strong that it outweighs the minor lapses in conciseness and occasional abrupt transitions.

strengths: Mostly appropriate and correct mathematical language and notation throughout
Effective use of multiple representations (tables, regression and derivative plots, error-propagation)
Generally clear explanations with consistent referencing of figures
weaknesses: Minor inconsistencies in variable notation (mixing âtâ/âxâ) and missing parentheses
Some figures (especially graphs) are too small and lack axis labels or gridlines
Typographical errors in one second-derivative derivation
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: All three strands align solidly with band 3: the student uses mathematical language and notation mostly appropriately, deploys multiple representations effectively, and communicates clearly though not entirely consistently.  The few missing labels, size issues and notation slips preclude band 4.

strengths: Clear personal motivation rooted in bio-engineering interests
Evidence of independent decision-making in experimental design and model choice
Significant creativity shown through integration of error propagation and derivative analysis
weaknesses: Approach remains within standard IA techniques without novel or highly innovative methods
No advanced optimisation or creative extension beyond logistic modelling
Personal narrative could be deepened with more critical self-reflection on methodological choices
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The student demonstrates significant evidence of independent thinking, a clear personal approach and creativity appropriate to band 2.  However, the work lacks the outstanding originality or exceptionally novel methods required for band 3.

strengths: Meaningful reflection on experimental limitations and model fit
Some critical analysis of RÂ² values and derivative outcomes
Clear connections drawn between mathematical results and biological interpretation
weaknesses: Reflection remains at a descriptive level without deep quantitative critique (e.g. no F-test)
Selection of thresholds (e.g. 0.001 growth rate) is unexplained
Opportunities for proposing detailed future experiments or sensitivity analyses are not fully realized
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Reflection consistently meets the criteria for band 2: there is meaningful reflection and critique with clear connections to understanding, but the analysis does not achieve the depth, rigor or substantial critical insight required for band 3.

strengths: Sophisticated application of logistic modelling, including first and second derivatives to pinpoint inflection points
Purposeful use of propagated uncertainty to assess confidence in parameter estimates
Solid, mostly correct mathematical reasoning with only minor algebraic and precision errors
weaknesses: Occasional algebraic misprints (quotient rule denominator) and inconsistent significant figures
Error-propagation shown for only one sample rather than all key time points
Inflection times reported with excessive decimal precision beyond data resolution
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Although the core techniques lie within the HL syllabus (band 4), the combination of advanced derivative analysis, purposeful errorâpropagation and rigorous model justification demonstrates a level of mathematical sophistication that merits a bump to band 5.  The few minor errors do not undermine the overall rigor and depth of the mathematics.

strandSelections.reasoning: Designing and carrying out a three-temperature experiment, choosing logistic versus alternative models, and deciding on inflection-point criteria demonstrate independent decision-making beyond a template approach, satisfying âsignificant evidence of independent thinking.â  The work stops short of novel theory or complex optimisation that would warrant the highest band.

The student demonstrates solid understanding of logistic behaviour, growth rate interpretation and error propagation.  Explanations are appropriate and accurate, but do not push into rigorous justification such as parameter-estimation theory or confidence intervals, corresponding to âgood understanding throughoutâ rather than âthorough with rigourâ.

Regression parameters are computed correctly (consistent with plotted curves) and derivative forms are mathematically sound, though some algebraic simplifications in the denominator are mishandled typographically.  Numerical conclusions (inflection times, carrying capacities) align with models, indicating âcorrect with minor errorsâ.

Almost all material (tables, graphs, derivations) is relevant to answering the research question, but the report is lengthy; procedural text, repeated definitions of OD600 and long quotations of uncertainty formulae add volume without further insight.  Therefore it is ârelevant and mostly conciseâ rather than âhighly concise throughout.â

The student employs correct symbols for logistic parameters, derivatives and uncertainty notation, and explains variables clearly.  Minor inconsistencies (mixing âtâ and âxâ, missing parentheses, unit omissions) appear but do not hamper understanding, aligning with âmostly appropriate language and notation.â

Explanations accompanying mathematics are generally clear and references to figures are consistent.  Sporadic typographical errors in equations and the occasional unexplained jump in algebra detract from full consistency, placing the work in the âclear and mostly consistentâ band.

Logistic modelling, first/second derivatives and propagated uncertainty all lie squarely within HL syllabus and are applied purposefully to the context, satisfying ârelevant mathematics at course level used effectivelyâ.  Techniques remain standard; there is no advanced differential-equation fitting or non-linear optimisation that would evidence sophistication (bands 5â6).

Tables of raw and averaged data, multiple regression graphs, and derivative plots support the argument effectively.  Inclusion of error-propagation table, though routine, demonstrates multiple representations.  However, no calculated values are superimposed on derivative graphs and some figures (exponential fits) are too small to read, so sophistication is limited to âeffective useâ rather than âsophisticated use.â

Reflection appears in the Evaluation section: the student questions the limited temperature range, short duration, and mismatch with true carrying capacity.  This goes beyond token commentary but remains surface-level; alternative experimental designs or quantitative sensitivity checks are not pursued, so depth is âmeaningfulâ not âsubstantialâ.

Applying logistic modelling, first- and second-derivative analysis and error propagation shows initiative, yet these are standard IA techniques.  No particularly novel mathematical tool or creative data manipulation is attempted, giving âsignificantâ rather than âoutstandingâ creativity.

The exploration follows a clear narrative: introduction â background â data collection â modelling â interpretation â evaluation.  Ideas build sensibly from biological context to mathematical model selection and finally to critique, with no sections that feel out of place.  Nonetheless, occasional digressions (long procedural detail, repeated explanations of logistic form) and some abrupt jumps (e.g. straight into derivative algebra without signposting) prevent the flow from being âexcellentâ.  Hence âcoherent and clear logical developmentâ (band 3) rather than âhighly coherent with excellent developmentâ.

The student compares RÂ² across models, interprets derivative outcomes biologically and discusses error propagation, indicating âmeaningful analysis with some critiqueâ.  However the critique is descriptive; there is no robust statistical test or recalibration, so it falls short of âdeep critical analysisâ.

Links between mathematics and biological understanding are drawn repeatedly (e.g., connecting inflection time to exponential phase).  These statements are clear but not explored in great depth (no quantitative biological validation), placing the work in the âclear connectionâ band.

Headings, sub-headings, numbered tables/figures and an appendix create a very tidy structure.  Introduction, methodology, analysis, evaluation and application appear in expected order and cross-reference each other.  Transitions between major sections are smooth and the reader can quickly locate information.  This meets the rubric description of âexceptionally well organised with seamless flow.â

The investigation grows out of the studentâs stated bio-engineering interests and laboratory experience, and this personal context guides the choice of variable, temperature range and the practical aim of reducing waiting times.  Such a âclear personal approachâ fits band 2.

annotations.comment: The title clearly specifies the investigation topic, giving the reader immediate context.
The logistic model choice is well justified, linking limited nutrients to the functionâs asymptotic behaviour.
Variable notation mixes âtâ and time descriptors inconsistently; maintain uniform symbols throughout derivations.
The methodology section contains extensive procedural detail that detracts from mathematical focus; summarise lab prep steps.
The dataâcollection procedure is described clearly and supports reproducibility of the OD measurements.
The planned sequence (averaging, regression, derivatives) logically addresses the research goals in mathematical terms.
Including the research question explicitly on the title page would improve clarity and anchor the readerâs expectations from the outset.
The candidate code placement interrupts the visual flow; consider relocating it to a designated cover sheet section.
The introductory paragraphs are informative but overly detailed; trimming procedural context would enhance conciseness.
Explicitly state the central research question at the end of the introduction to strengthen logical flow and guide the exploration.
The personal motivation in the introduction connects well to bioengineering interests, demonstrating genuine engagement.
The background heading is clear and effectively signals the shift to theoretical context.
Figures are too small and lack axis labels, which hampers reader interpretation of background graphical information.
Ensure all figures include clear labels and units on axes to improve clarity and consistency.
Although the linear model RÂ² exceeds the logistic model in one instance, a statistical comparison (e.g. F-test) would solidify the model choice.
Apply the quotient rule carefully: an algebraic misprint appears in the intermediate denominator term.
The use of the quotient rule demonstrates a solid grasp of calculus underpinning the logistic model.
The sample average calculation shows inconsistent significant figures; standardise precision to match instrument accuracy.
Include units for time and OD600 in the table caption to ensure readers immediately understand the measurements.
The reported RÂ² comparisons are clear, highlighting the logistic modelâs superior fit across temperatures.
Some graphs remain small and lack gridlines or clear scaling; enlarging and annotating axes would improve interpretability.
The definition of carrying capacity via a 0.001 rate threshold requires justification; explain how this value was chosen.
Define the secondâderivative threshold selection more rigorously, or perform a sensitivity analysis on this parameter.
Notation error in the second-derivative derivation for 25 Â°C: the exponent uses âe^{-5707x}â instead of the correct term.
The second derivative is used adeptly to locate the inflection point, illustrating sophisticated mathematical application.
Inflection times are reported with excessive decimal precision; align to the 0.5 h resolution of the data.
The error-propagation analysis is welcome, but only one sample calculation is shown; extend this to all key time points.
The conclusion succinctly reiterates findings and numerical comparisons, reinforcing the investigationâs coherence.
The evaluation section acknowledges important limitations but could propose detailed future experiments for deeper insight.
